title: Full Venue Buyouts
metaTitle: Full Venue Buyout Mission Beach San Diego | Miss B's Coconut Club
description: Full venue buyout at Miss B's Coconut Club in Mission Beach, San Diego. The entire bar, dining room, and patio exclusively yours for your event.
cardDesc: Take over the entire Miss B's Coconut Club — bar, dining room, and patio. The ultimate Mission Beach private event experience.
body: A full Miss B's buyout means the entire venue is yours — the open-air bar, the tropical dining room, the fire pit patio, and every copper flamingo tap handle on the wall. The whole thing. Exclusively for your event.
Our team works with you on every detail: custom menu, cocktail program, room configuration, and dedicated staff throughout. This is the ultimate Mission Beach private event experience.
includes: All three spaces — bar, dining room, patio
Full custom menu and cocktail program
